title: `podman pull` ends with `lsetxattr /: operation not supported`
body:
### Issue Description

I am running in a rootless environment RockyOS8. The namespace is enabled.
When I try to run `podman pull ubuntu`, it ends with an error. Below is the details:
```
WARN[0000] Network file system detected as backing store.  Enforcing overlay option `force_mask="700"`.  Add it to storage.conf to silence this warning
Resolved "ubuntu" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 3153aa388d02 done
Error: copying system image from manifest list: writing blob: adding layer with blob "sha256:3153aa388d026c26a2235e1ed0163e350e451f41a8a313e1804d7e1afb857ab4": processing tar file(lsetxattr /: operation not supported): exit status 1
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

run `podman pull ubuntu`

### Describe the results you received

As described above.

### Describe the results you expected

The image should be pulled.

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
`Backing Filesystem: nfs`

That seems to not support `user.` extended attributes, so podman cannot store the file modes in the extended attribute.
you need to use a different file system for the containers storage
